team_name: TenderSahayak: Transparent, Explainable AI for Government Tender Eligibility Assessment
summary: Design an AI-based technical platform for government procurement to understand tenders, evaluate eligibility, and produce explainable evaluation reports.
key_steps: Processing bidder's submissions in various formats
Matching bidder values with tender requirements
Sending uncertain cases to human officers
Flagging data inconsistencies for human review
Recording actions in a tamper-proof audit log
optimization_claims: Speed and consistency of evaluation process
Audit trail for scrutiny in official and legal contexts
constraints_addressed: Volume and complexity of tender documents
